title: Chitinase
content: Chitinases ("chitodextrinase", "1,4-beta-poly-N-acetylglucosaminidase", "poly-beta-glucosaminidase", "beta-1,4-poly-N-acetyl glucosamidinase", "poly[1,4-(N-acetyl-beta-D-glucosaminide)] glycanohydrolase", "(1- 4)-2-acetamido-2-deoxy-beta-D-glucan glycanohydrolase") are hydrolytic <a href="enzyme" enzyme</a s that break down <a href="glycosidic%20bond" glycosidic bond</a s in <a href="chitin" chitin</a.
